_publications._publicationTitle: Hybridization Capture-Based Next-Generation Sequencing to Evaluate Coding Sequence and Deep Intronic Mutations in the NF1 Gene.

_contextSnippet: The average number of bases with Q ≥ 20 across the three Ion Torrent PGM TM runs (12 samples) was 96.9 Mbp, constituting 83.3% of total output. Overall average depth was 177, ranging from 52 to 470.
resourceName: Ion Torrent Personal Genome Machine—Ion Torrent PGM
details: Average number of bases with Q ≥ 20 across three runs was 96.9 Mbp, constituting 83.3% of total output with overall average depth of 177, ranging from 52 to 470
